column1: # Benchmark molecule size series.  Columns: name  xyz_relpath  natoms  tags
# tags = comma-separated method keys this molecule is intended for:
# (size-appropriate; edit freely. run_gansu.sh processes in this order = increasing size.)
# NOTE: dlpno_ccsd_t (perturbative triples) is O(N^7) — much steeper than CCSD, so its
# size ceiling is reached earlier; the runner stops at the first OOM/timeout per method.
